scripts.status: pnpm --filter @air-jam/devtools-core build && pnpm --filter create-airjam exec tsx src/index.ts status --dir .
scripts.reset:local: pnpm --filter @air-jam/devtools-core build && pnpm --filter create-airjam exec tsx src/index.ts reset local --dir .
scripts.release:public: node scripts/repo/cli.mjs release trigger --channel latest --package all-public
scripts.release:public:next: node scripts/repo/cli.mjs release trigger --channel next --package all-public
scripts.check:ci: pnpm --filter platform content:check-generated && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm guard:canonical && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm run repo -- perf sanity
scripts.check:release: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm run repo -- perf sanity --strict && pnpm smoke:release
scripts.check:release:doctor: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm test:repo-contracts && pnpm check:platform:deploy && pnpm check:release
scripts.check:release:publish: pnpm test:repo-contracts && pnpm --filter platform build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm smoke:server
scripts.smoke:release: pnpm smoke:server && pnpm smoke:browser && pnpm test:scaffold
scripts.test: pnpm test:repo-contracts && pnpm --filter sdk build && pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter sdk test && pnpm --filter platform test
scripts.test:scaffold: pnpm --filter create-airjam build && pnpm --filter create-airjam smoke
scripts.test:scaffold:registry: pnpm --filter create-airjam build && pnpm --filter create-airjam smoke:registry
scripts.test:scaffold:tarball: pnpm --filter create-airjam build && pnpm --filter create-airjam smoke:tarball
